name: IdsDmMbrshDmMbrDntlRwrdAccumExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte1 AS (SELECT A.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, A.YR_NO, B.SRC_CD AS SRC_SYS_CD, A.PLN_YR_EFF_DT, A.PLN_YR_END_DT, A.ANUL_PD_AMT, A.ANUL_PD_RWRD_THRSHLD_AMT, A.AVLBL_RWRD_AMT, A.AVLBL_BNS_AMT, A.USE_RWRD_AMT, A.OUT_OF_NTWK_CLM_CT FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.MBR_DNTL_RWRD_ACCUM A LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG B ON A.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = B.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE A.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSRunCycle}), cte2 AS (SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, MBR_UNIQ_KEY, YR_NO, CAST(PLN_YR_EFF_DT AS DATETIME2(3)) AS PLN_YR_EFF_DT, CAST(PLN_YR_END_DT AS DATETIME2(3)) AS PLN_YR_END_DT, ANUL_PD_AMT, ANUL_PD_RWRD_THRSHLD_AMT, AVLBL_RWRD_AMT, AVLBL_BNS_AMT, USE_RWRD_AMT, OUT_OF_NTWK_CLM_CT FROM cte1) SELECT * FROM cte2

Annotations:
Write MBRSH_DM_MBR_DNTL_RWRD_ACCUM Data into a Sequential file for Load Job IdsDmMbrshDmMbrDntlRwrdAccumLoad.
Read all the Data from IDS MBR_DNTL_RWRD_ACCUM Table; Pull records based on LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO
Job Name: IdsDmMbrshDmMbrDntlRwrdAccumExtr
